roa.docketEntryComment: DEF MO TO VACATE CONVICTN & W/DRAW GUILTY PLEA IN 1473,7PC;NON OPPO FILED

/CAL DEFENSE MOTION TO SET ASIDE GUILTY PLEA AND VACATE PRIOR CONVICTIONRSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1473,7/INTC/MO GRTD/CTORD: THE SENTENCE OF 03-19-03 IS VACATED/CTORD: THE DEFENDANT'S GUILTY PLEA TO A FELONY VIOLATION OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11352(A), ENTERED 02-26-03 IS VACATED AND A NEW PLEA OF NOT GUILTY IS ENTERED/X: AT THIS TIME, THE PEOPLE'S MOTION TO FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT ADDING COUNT 3, A FELONY VIOLATION OF PENALCODE SECTION 32 IS GRANTED,/IRRC/FAWC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:003/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/REMA//AJW/DNACOMP/CH2:ISS:PROB:PROB 1D:PJ1D/CTS:1/OBEY/ACCEP/CTORD:SENTENCE ISENTERED NUNC PRO TUNC TO 03-19-03/CTORD:FINES AND FEES PREVIOULSY ORDEREDARE DEEMED SATISFIED, COLLECTION OF FINES AND FEES IS PERMANENTLY SUSPENDED/X:SEE WRITTEN ORDER,/

/TEXT:DEFT IS ORDERED HELD TO ANSWER/HOLDING//WIT SWORN:OFF, CONSTANTINCE ZACCOS, SFPD/EXHMA:1, SFPD ANALYZED EVIDENCE ENVELOPE/EXHMA:1A, SMALL PLASTIC BAG, OFF WHITE OBJECTS THEREIN//EXHMA:1B, SMALL PLASTIC BAG, OFF WHITE OBJECTS THEREIN/EXHMA:1C, SMALL PLASTIC BAG, OFF WHITE OBJECTS THEREIN/EXHMA:1D, SFPD CRIME LAB REPORT, CHEMICAL/HTA1:2,3/BAIL:35,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/HTAHEARFIND/TEXT/***PRINT ON COURT ORDER WITH CHARGES/
/CTORD:PROBATION IN #188392-02 IS HEREBY TERMINATED AS UNSUCCESSFUL/
CONTD TS DA MTR/S12/PROB ADM REV/SHER/NB/
/IBARRA/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G//DEFT ADV RTS:1/DISM3/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:03-19-03/
/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAW/DEFTARR/NTW/LD:4-08-2003/987,2/
